3220210.name: Slenderman: The Unknowns
3220210.description:
Slenderman: The Unknowns

Can you survive the forest, or will you become the next Slenderman?

Trapped in a dark, eerie forest, your only way out is to find car parts hidden in abandoned locations. But time is running out. If you don’t escape before midnight, you’ll take Slenderman’s place and be cursed to haunt the forest forever.

What to Expect

  • A creepy forest filled with chilling surprises.

  • The thrill of searching for car parts while being hunted.

  • A race against time to break the curse or become the hunted.

  • A terrifying atmosphere that keeps you on edge from start to finish.

Can You Break the Curse?

The clock is ticking. Will you find your way out and end the nightmare, or will you be trapped in the forest forever?

Wishlist now to face the horror and uncover the secrets of Slenderman: The Unknowns.
3220210.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 日语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
